name: FaceFun
short_description: FaceFun is a virtual character simulation software,It support VRM and Live2d import,and can capture the user's face expression and head position changes in real-time through webcam, these actions are synchronized to the lovely animated characters.
detailed_description:
FaceFun is a virtual character simulation software, it can capture the user's face expression and head position changes in real-time through webcam, these actions are synchronized to the lovely animated characters.
vup,youtuber,vtuber use.

Version 2.0 Support：

Vrm and Live2d Unlimited Import!


Live2d Support File Type:

.model3.json



The back button is hidden in the upper left corner of the model character window.
Mouse Scroll forward: zoom out characters
Mouse Scroll backward: zoom in the character
The mouse can drag the model at will.


FaceFun can be used when recording videos, live broadcasting, and other entertainment.

Feature

>use the Live2d Virtual Role.

>Synchronize facial expressions and head movements in real time.
>Window can be freely adjusted to the size you like.
>Support Windows and Mac OS X.

Note: Software needs to capture the user's facial movements in real time, so a computer or laptop needs a working webcam.
